name: IOVANCE BIOTHERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: Iovance Biotherapeutics is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) cell therapies for solid tumor cancers. Its two commercial products are Amtagvi (lifileucel), the first FDA-approved one-time individualized T cell therapy for previously treated advanced melanoma, and Proleukin (aldesleukin), an IL-2 product used in the Amtagvi treatment regimen. The company conducts centralized, scalable manufacturing and has ongoing registrational trials in frontline melanoma and non-small cell lung cancer.

products.name: Amtagvi (lifileucel)
products.description: First FDA-approved one-time individualized TIL cell therapy for adult patients with previously treated advanced, unresectable or metastatic melanoma.

products.name: Proleukin (aldesleukin)
products.description: Interleukin-2 (IL-2) product used in the Amtagvi treatment regimen and other approved oncology applications; sold to U.S. and international distributors.

partnerships.description: Iovance was founded to build upon TIL cell therapy initially developed at the NCI and other academic research centers.
Working with EMA to resubmit a centralized marketing authorization application for Amtagvi in 2026 following withdrawal of initial MAA in July 2025.
TILVANCE-301 Phase 3 trial investigates Amtagvi in combination with pembrolizumab in frontline advanced melanoma.
